1.title: Share the Love
1.description: This lovely badge was earned by users who shared their favorite Twitch clips in February 2025.

1.title: Turbo
1.description: A subscriber of Twitch's monthly premium user service

1.title: Twitch Recap 2025
1.description: This exclusive badge was earned by the top 20% of Twitch users in 2025.

There's like a whole trilogy based on yoshi dying to lava glitches and somehow this wasn't found
and i thought to try it with the lava edge since there's no chance of being crushed on entry

and the yoshi thinks you're riding him so you can stick out his tongue

Old for the levels and new for the overworld

bye platform
New let me edit secret exits 2-3 and old would allow me to edit levels without the lm 3.0+ patches that change how secret exits 2-3 work
lol
The overworld is a separate editor so if you open the hack in lm 3.0+ and only edit the overworld the hack will say the last version it was edited in was 2.53
